programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17
programme.desc: After the remains of an elderly woman are discovered in Florida, investigators track down suspects with a complex family dynamic. the woman at the center of it tells her story for the first time, revealing details of the harrowing crime.

programme.title: The Agency: Central Intelligence S1
programme.desc: Henry and Martian run diplomatic interference. Danny walks a tightrope.

programme.title: Special Forces: World's Toughest Test S3
programme.desc: Recruits must unlock a safe in a gas-filled room.

programme.title: The 52nd American Music Awards
programme.desc: The 52nd American Music Awards (AMAs) will be hosted by Queen Latifah from the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas. This fan-voted event honor’s the year’s top artists with 50 categories focusing on breakthroughs.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent S19
programme.desc: The nation's most beloved talent competition continues with a new set of thrilling acts performing for the judges and the golden opportunity to perform for the Royal Family

programme.title: Ghosts S5
programme.desc: The story continues for Sam and Jay as they run their Woodstone B&B and restaurant, navigate the ghosts' day-to-day antics, and deal with new life challenges.

programme.title: The Agency: Central Intelligence S1
programme.desc: Henry and Martian run diplomatic interference. Danny walks a tightrope.

programme.title: Chicago Fire S14
programme.desc: Firehouse 51 is called to an airfield when a passenger jet suddenly goes silent mid-air, triggering a high-stakes emergency. Their discovery cracks open a deadlier mystery - one with consequences that could put countless lives in jeopardy.

programme.title: Chicago P.D. S13
programme.desc: An airport crisis reveals a larger conspiracy tied to a passenger jet, launching the Intelligence Unit into a dangerous chase for the suspect while the FBI watches closely.

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a war between humans and robots with artificial intelligence, a former soldier finds the robots' secret weapon to end the conflict, an AI in the form of a child.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Fired from the Anti-Villain League, Gru finds himself in a major identity crisis until the appearance of a mysterious stranger reminds him how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.title: Regretting You
programme.desc: After a devastating accident, Morgan Grant and her daughter Clara must rediscover life and love in this heart-felt coming-of-age story.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: Four misfits struggling with ordinary problems are pulled through a portal into the Overworld.

programme.title: How to Train your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Faced with an impending threat unlike others, Hiccup and Toothless battle to protect all that they love with a female Light Fury as they travel to a mythical hidden world.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: A down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the teenage son of his new crime boss after fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: An extraction team embarks on a mission to extract prehistoric creatures' DNA that will bring life-saving benefits to humanity.

programme.title: Red Sonja
programme.desc: A barbarian huntress, Red Sonja, must unite a group of unlikely warriors to face off against Emperor Draygan and his deadly bride.

programme.title: Trust
programme.desc: After a scandal, a Hollywood starlet retreats to a remote cabin – but betrayal by the man she trusted sparks a brutal game of survival.

programme.title: American Beauty

programme.desc: A former Marine and his old war buddy face off against the Mexican cartel behind the disappearance of his daughter.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over vast deserts, enormous diamonds, and the world's largest inland oasis.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Explore the Western Cape's stunning shorelines, dramatic mountains, and richly-diverse metropolis, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Observe a land filled with geological phenomena whose majesty can only truly be appreciated from the sky. From forgotten shipwrecks strewn along the coastline to the unexplained fairy circles in Koakoveld, Namibia's secrets will be revealed.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over the richly diverse, African nation of Zambia. Including cities crafted by the world's richest men and markets teeming with some of the world's poorest people.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Battle of Midway: The True Story
programme.desc: An inside look at the Battle of Midway, the aircraft used on both sides of the fight, and the dramatic story of one fighter pilot and his pivotal role in America’s first true victory of the Pacific War.

programme.title: Battle of Okinawa in Color
programme.desc: Okinawa was the site of the last battle of the last great war of the 20th century, with a casualty rate in the tens of thousands. Through it all, military cameramen risked their lives to film the conflict, from brutal land combat to fierce kamikaze attacks at sea.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: View South Africa's mountain ranges, bustling cities and untamed wildlife from the air. This is South Africa's journey from pre-human skeletons to modern Skyscrapers.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over vast deserts, enormous diamonds, and the world's largest inland oasis.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Explore the Western Cape's stunning shorelines, dramatic mountains, and richly-diverse metropolis, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Observe a land filled with geological phenomena whose majesty can only truly be appreciated from the sky. From forgotten shipwrecks strewn along the coastline to the unexplained fairy circles in Koakoveld, Namibia's secrets will be revealed.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over the richly diverse, African nation of Zambia. Including cities crafted by the world's richest men and markets teeming with some of the world's poorest people.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Marine biologists Eve Jourdain and Richard Kaoliussen have spent two years studying the orcas in Norway, where they have adapted the carrousel technique to their habitat.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the depths of the ocean, swift and agile sea lions perform incredible underwater maneuvers to outwit their enemies. Here, on the beaches of Patagonia, as a sea lion pup learns to swim, predators are preparing an attack on him, one that will be fatal.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Cape Gannets are tough hunters flying over the coasts for their favorite prey: shoals of sardines, waiting for a surprising ally: dolphins.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Under the burning sun of Cape Cross, large colonies of seals gather on Namibia's Skeleton Coast...The males, who can weigh up to 360 kg, patrol the territory to protect their females and young. But new predators are coming from the land, forcing them to learn new defense behaviors.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: Islands of Creation
programme.desc: In the jungles of a remote archipelago in the South Pacific, a biologist is attempting to do something Charles Darwin and Ernst Mayr never accomplished: catch evolution in the act of creating new species. Albert Uy is on the verge of an amazing discovery in the Solomon Islands, but there's a threat looming on the horizon.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: In this episode we meet some animal elders who help us understand the psychological mechanisms associated with long life and the positive social value long-lived animals bring to their communities.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Meet some late-life lovers and explore the reasons behind their sexual longevity and their ability to reproduce well into their later years.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: We explore the integral role that older animals play in their communities and investigate how animals learn over the course of their lives.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Human, plant, animal, bacteria, all have one inevitable thing in common; death. In this episode we discover the ways in which aging animals defy our usual understanding of the circle of life.

programme.title: Islands of Creation
programme.desc: In the jungles of a remote archipelago in the South Pacific, a biologist is attempting to do something Charles Darwin and Ernst Mayr never accomplished: catch evolution in the act of creating new species. Albert Uy is on the verge of an amazing discovery in the Solomon Islands, but there's a threat looming on the horizon.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild

programme.desc: In Kentucky, the racers are competing in the next Great 8 event -- but the contest turns tense when Kye and Lizzy call it quits, Damon struggles with a broken pro-charger.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm (S2)
programme.desc: When a monster derecho spawns destructive tornadoes across Texas, a weather spotter must race to save a young family whose house took a direct hit.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm (S2)
programme.desc: In 2024, Florida is pounded by two huge back-to-back deadly hurricanes. Helene and Milton wreak havoc with storm surges and dozens of tornadoes.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm (S2)
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north, causing massive flooding in Appalachia. As the deluge sweeps away one woman, a man jumps into the water to save her.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm (S2)
programme.desc: In 2024 a tornado outbreak devastates the Central Plains. Trains flip, homes are torn apart, and a deadly night twister hurls debris onto a car.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm (S2)
programme.desc: A rare winter tornado outbreak tears through towns across Tennessee as dozens of eyewitnesses capture the devastating power of nature in real time.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Rick Ness takes a job working on 16-year-old Parker Schnabel's gold mine. The two miners form a strong bond, bringing in millions in gold.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing the Unknown (S2)

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Rick plows through Vegas Valley paydirt and makes a big score, but an obstacle threatens to stall him. Parker's four-plant blitz stumbles.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)

programme.title: Expanse: The Nannup Four - The People In the Blue House
programme.desc: When three adults and a child disappear without a trace from the isolated bush community of Nannup in 2007, it sparks disturbing theories. What was happening in the little blue house? Presented by Dominique Bayens.

programme.title: I was actually there - The Beatles' World Record Adelaide Visit
programme.desc: When The Beatles flew into Adelaide, they had no idea that the biggest crowd they would ever witness was waiting for them. Fans describe the life-changing experience of seeing the biggest band in the world arrive.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 2
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 12 - Melbourne v GWS Giants
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Audra's Eat, Roam, Relish - Episode 1
programme.desc: Audra Morrice journeys to the colourful island state of Sarawak, Malaysia where she indulges in a cultural feast for the senses via its rich gastronomy. Audra explores Malaysian roots through food, family and local culture.

programme.title: Field to Feast - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are countless varieties of chillies, but in this episode, we visit a farm producing a type of chilli that is cherished by Turkish Australians. Thanh then puts his taste beds to the test and tackles this spicy classic.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 151
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you today's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Compass - Labassa - If theseWalls Could Talk
programme.desc: Compass was given rare access to Labassa, the historic Renaissance mansion in Melbourne to film many of the remaining tenants. We focus on the post war years of Jewish refugees and 1970's bohemians, artists and performers.

programme.title: Expanse: The Nannup Four - The People In the Blue House
programme.desc: When three adults and a child disappear without a trace from the isolated bush community of Nannup in 2007, it sparks disturbing theories. What was happening in the little blue house? Presented by Dominique Bayens.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole - Irish Giant
programme.desc: Marc Fennell unpicks the twisting history of Charles Byrne, the Irish Giant. It is a story of betrayal, exploitation, and the brutal reality of the medical industry.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Turtles
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones heads to Rosemary Island, WA to join turtle scientists on their annual nest survey. It's hot work, but worth it - females laying eggs; flatback hatchlings, and she even wrestles a Green Turtle.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 2
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend - Episode 44

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 17
programme.desc: More than just the action on the field, Offsiders tackles the week in sport from all angles - from business, politics, marketing, the fans, society, culture, history and the athletes' perspective. Presented by Abbey Gelmi.

programme.title: Audra's Eat, Roam, Relish - Episode 1

programme.title: ABC News Overnight - Episode 44

programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 4 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano wastong gamitin ang mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math
programme.desc: Learn about parallel and perpendicular lines, angles, triangles, quadrilaterals, continuous and repeating patterns and number sentences, and the concept of time, perimeter, area, and volume.

programme.title: Grade 4 English
programme.desc: Learn what are adverbs, signal words, and graphic organizers, and how to analyze a story and infer the speaker's tone, mood and purpose.

programme.title: Grade 4 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain ang bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan sa lipunan, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng bansa.

programme.title: Grade 4 Science

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 10 上山下海过一夜
programme.desc: Penghu boasts stunning basalt and volcanic landscapes, rich with natural and marine treasures. In this episode, the team explores its most unique hidden gems — from rare columnar basalt cliffs and dense stone weir clusters to local delicacies like peanuts stir-fried on cowfish-stone stoves. They dive into Penghu’s blend of ocean beauty and wartime heritage, ending their adventure with an offshore quest to find traces of ancient whales.

programme.desc: A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 20 成为饭吧
programme.desc: Under Jin Yingxin's guidance, Li Duojing gets a chef's license and applies for a palace job, where Cui Shujing hires her to use as leverage against Jin Yingxin. Xu Minjing, worries about her son's interest in Jin Yingxin, tries to force her away.

programme.desc: YeKang leads his men to attack XingJing gang and AhHuang is badly injured.

programme.desc: AhNuo explains to NuoLi why Lidi has a deep hatred towards the rebels. A mysterious foreigner helps LiDi, AhNuo and NuoLi to escape.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻

programme.title: Rindu Atuk
programme.desc: While staying with his grandfather, Harun, Pian found a box containing love letters and items belonging to his grandfather. He and his friend investigate and later reunite his grandfather with his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 2
programme.desc: Exchanging his corporate image for that of a live streamer, Asri is straddling in unchartered waters. He struggles to find help from his ex-wife, Hani and two home-based sellers who are suspicious of him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 3
programme.desc: Asri wants to reward Kak Sal and Kak Cik for helping him with Raja Bundle's promo video. Hani is hurt when she mistakenly thinks Asri takes her shopping to reward her. Hani feels it is time to move on. Raja Bundle's business begins to bloom, causing the envious Madi Lambung to collaborate with other HBB sellers and try to sway Asri's customers. Asri is devastated when one of his HBB sellers betrays him and abandons Raja Bundle after Asri confirms a big order.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 4
programme.desc: Ema joins Raja Bundle and manages to boost sales for Asri. In return, Asri helps Ema to care for her son, Omar, who is recovering. Hani starts dating again. Amirul and Asri's relationship strains further after Asri jumps to conclusion and accuses Amirul of being a school bully. Asri announces the opening of Raja Bundle's cloud kitchen, much to the delight of his HBB sellers. When Asri bumps into Madi Lambung, he is shocked by the latter's hostility towards him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 5
programme.desc: As the Raja Bundle cloud kitchen takes shape, Asri also needs to expand his team while continuing to balance the other aspects of his life. However, a revelation about his ex-wife Hani is bound to surprise him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 6
programme.desc: When Madi starts selling cheap, Asri and his HBBs must find a way to overcome this challenge. But in trying to do this, they makes promises to their customers which they have trouble fulfilling. Ema and Omar were welcomed by the sudden arrival of an unexpected person.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 7
programme.desc: The HBBs who have left Madi Lambung begin to sell their products with Asri. Asri's former boss notices Asri's booming business and he is thinking of creating a post specially for Asri. Isnin goes snooping around at the cloud kitchen to see how Madi's former sellers are doing but something else catches his eyes. Zafrul sees hope in his relationship with Hani.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 8
programme.desc: Remi brags about his stints in the filming industry to Asri. Meanwhile, Asri has asked his HBBs to reduce his orders. But the HBBs coax him to reduce his prices so that more will buy. Remi wants Ema to stop baking at the cloud kitchen. Kak Sal tells the HBBs that Asri will be leaving them in the lurch. Kak Sal's rambling unknowingly feeds Madi with information of what is happening at Raja Bundle.

programme.title: Haikal Nak Jadi Cef - EP 9
programme.desc: Trouble brews back on the first day of school after the term holidays. Chef Rahmat's food causes Zaidi and Haikal to go to the nurse's office due to a food allergy. Haikal and Zaidi reconciles reluctantly. This causes Chef Rahmat's to close down his stall, this allowing Mariah to open the new stall in school.
